questions.question: As of 2019, what was the highest grossing film of all time?
What mobile payment app allowed friends to quickly split bills, such as movies, dinner, rent, tickets, etc?
Austin Post was more commonly known by what name?
In what South American city were the 2016 Summer Olympics held?
What did it mean to "photobomb" someone?
questions.answer: To jump into a photo without people knowing.
